willBeObserved: Montgomery runtime registry recognition while disabled
Runtime gate enforcement with GRIDLY_MONTGOMERY_RUNTIME_GATE remaining false
Containment enforcement between Liberty, Montgomery, unknown, and missing county metadata
County ownership enforcement for package-scoped Montgomery assets and Liberty-owned runtime defaults
Liberty baseline preservation as the only active default county
Protected-system preservation for historical, DriveTexas, Transportation Intelligence, Supabase, migrations, and data/ boundaries
Evidence completeness needed for V588 launch decision package preparation
willNotBeObserved: Montgomery selection, production enablement, or operational traffic
Supabase writes, schema changes, migrations, or production data mutations
Placement of Montgomery assets under data/
Historical reads, history UI, historical API exposure, or consumer history dashboards
Transportation Intelligence enablement, display, or activation
runtimeAreasInScope: GRIDLY_COUNTY_REGISTRY includes Montgomery as known but disabled
gridlyNormalizeCountyId resolves Montgomery and unknown counties back to Liberty while Montgomery is disabled
containmentAreasInScope: Liberty rows are allowed in Liberty context
Montgomery rows are denied in Liberty context
Montgomery self-context is denied while non-operational
Missing county metadata preserves Liberty legacy behavior only
registryAreasInScope: Boundary and asset paths remaining package-scoped
validationAreasInScope: Changed-path audit for supabase/, migrations/, and data/

checkpoints.name: observation_start_readiness_check
checkpoints.timing: Before any controlled observation window begins
requiredEvidence: owner confirms no activation decision is implied

checkpoints.name: closeout_signoff_review
checkpoints.timing: Observation closeout before V588 is drafted

evidenceCollectionRequirements: Record exact command, timestamp, reviewer, result, and artifact references for each checkpoint
Attach failing output or observation notes for any PASS WITH OBSERVATIONS or FAIL result
Preserve changed-path evidence proving no Supabase, migration, or data/ modifications occurred
Document any accepted observation with severity, owner, due date, and launch-decision impact
finalObservationSignoffRequirements: All PASS WITH OBSERVATIONS entries have accepted dispositions
Montgomery remains staged, disabled, non-selectable, and gate-blocked
V588 launch decision inputs are complete

launchDecisionInputsRequiredForV588: Final failure threshold review with zero unresolved blockers
Runtime invariant test results from start, midpoint, and closeout
Changed-path audit proving no Supabase, migration, or data/ changes
Governance signoff from runtime, containment, protected-boundary, and launch decision owners
Explicit statement that V586 did not activate Montgomery and that V588 is a decision package only
